name: sniff-mcp
description: Agent-callable canine genomics — open MCP server + REST API over the Sniff Atlas: breed-stratified allele frequencies for 9.67M variants across 188 dog breeds, calibrated AI pathogenicity, and a variant/gene/breed/disease knowledge graph. Zero-setup: npx sniff-mcp.
author: Matt Gehring <matt@sniff.world>
